StencilBuilder.h

7 // -*- C++ -*-
8 #ifndef STENCILBUILDER_H
9 #define STENCILBUILDER_H
10 
11 #include <algorithm>
12 #include <vector>
13 
14 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/DiscreteOperator/BinarySearch.h"
15 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/DiscreteOperator/CoefficientArray.h"
16 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/DiscreteOperator/LinearSearch.h"
17 
18 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
19 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
20 
21 template<typename T>
22 class StencilSizesBuilderT
23 {
24 public:
25  StencilSizesBuilderT(CoefficientArrayT<T> * a_coefficient_array)
26  : m_coefficient_array(a_coefficient_array)
27  {
28  m_sizes.init(a_coefficient_array->faceGroup());
29  m_sizes.fill(0);
30  }
31 
32  void insert(const Face & a_face, const T & a_item, const Real & a_value = 0.);
33  void finalize();
34 private:
35  CoefficientArrayT<T> * m_coefficient_array;
36  ItemGroupMapT<Face, Integer> m_sizes;
37 };
38 
39 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
40 
41 template<typename T>
42 void StencilSizesBuilderT<T>::insert(const Face & a_face, const T & a_item, const Real & a_value)
43 {
44  m_sizes[a_face]++;
45 }
46 
47 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
48 
49 template<typename T>
50 void StencilSizesBuilderT<T>::finalize()
51 {
52  m_coefficient_array->init(m_sizes);
53 }
54 
55 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
56 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
57 
58 template<typename T>
59 class OrderedStencilBuilderT
60 {
61  typedef std::vector<Integer> TemporaryStencilType;
62 
63 public:
64  typedef typename CoefficientArrayT<T>::StencilLocalIdType StencilLocalIdType;
65  typedef BinarySearchT<StencilLocalIdType> SearchAlgorithm;
66 
67 public:
68  OrderedStencilBuilderT(CoefficientArrayT<T> * a_coefficient_array)
69  : m_coefficient_array(a_coefficient_array),
70  m_temporary(a_coefficient_array->faceGroup())
71  {
72  const FaceGroup & faces = a_coefficient_array->faceGroup();
73  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface, faces) {
74  const Face & F = *iface;
75  m_temporary[iface].reserve(a_coefficient_array->stencilSize(F));
76  }
77  }
78 
79  void insert(const Face & a_face, const T & a_item, const Real & a_value = 0.);
80  void finalize();
81 private:
82  CoefficientArrayT<T> * m_coefficient_array;
83  ItemGroupMapT<Face, TemporaryStencilType> m_temporary;
84 };
85 
86 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
87 
88 template<typename T>
89 void OrderedStencilBuilderT<T>::insert(const Face & a_face, const T & a_item, const Real & a_value)
90 {
91  TemporaryStencilType & stencil_face_temp = m_temporary[a_face];
92  TemporaryStencilType::iterator i =
93  std::lower_bound(stencil_face_temp.begin(), stencil_face_temp.end(), a_item.localId());
94  if(i==stencil_face_temp.end() || a_value<*i)
95  stencil_face_temp.insert(i, a_item.localId());
96 }
97 
98 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
99 
100 template<typename T>
101 void OrderedStencilBuilderT<T>::finalize()
102 {
103  const FaceGroup & faces = m_coefficient_array->faceGroup();
104  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface, faces) {
105  const Face & F = *iface;
106  StencilLocalIdType stencil_face = m_coefficient_array->stencilLocalId(F);
107  const TemporaryStencilType & stencil_face_temp = m_temporary[iface];
108  copy(stencil_face_temp.begin(), stencil_face_temp.end(), stencil_face.begin());
109  }
110 }
111 
112 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
113 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
114 
115 class CooresCellStencilBuilder
116 {
117  typedef std::vector<Integer> TemporaryStencilType;
118 
119 public:
120  typedef CoefficientArrayT<Cell>::StencilLocalIdType StencilLocalIdType;
121  typedef LinearSearchT<StencilLocalIdType> SearchAlgorithm;
122 
123 public:
124  CooresCellStencilBuilder(CoefficientArrayT<Cell> * a_coefficient_array)
125  : m_coefficient_array(a_coefficient_array),
126  m_temporary(a_coefficient_array->faceGroup())
127  {
128  const FaceGroup & faces = a_coefficient_array->faceGroup();
129  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface, faces) {
130  const Face & F = *iface;
131  TemporaryStencilType & stencil_face_temp = m_temporary[iface];
132  if(F.isSubDomainBoundary())
133  stencil_face_temp.reserve(a_coefficient_array->stencilSize(F)-1);
134  else
135  stencil_face_temp.reserve(a_coefficient_array->stencilSize(F)-2);
136  }
137  }
138 
139  void insert(const Face & a_face, const Cell & a_item, const Real & a_value = 0.);
140  void finalize();
141 private:
142  CoefficientArrayT<Cell> * m_coefficient_array;
143  ItemGroupMapT<Face, TemporaryStencilType> m_temporary;
144 };
145 
146 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
147 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
148 
149 #endif
